# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/servicePrincipals
    apiVersion: 2018-02-01
    name: <service_principal_name>
    properties:
      servicePrincipalType: <service_principal_type>
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
    name: "<role_assignment_name>"
    properties:
      principalId: <service_principal_objectId>
      roleDefinitionId: "/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c"
      scope: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>
